name: Filesystem MCP Server Capability Block
description: Capability profile for a filesystem MCP server proposed for install or exposure inside an approved project workspace.

mcp_server.name: Filesystem MCP Server
mcp_server.declared_purpose: Read, write, and list approved project files for agent-assisted development workflows.

capabilities: list directory contents inside approved paths
sensitive_capabilities: potential access to sensitive files if path controls are misconfigured

allowed_use: project documentation updates inside approved workspace
read-only inspection of approved project files
directory listing inside approved project paths
prohibited_use: access credential stores or private keys
read personal or unrelated system files
